# Single-node election + proposal scenario.
# Verifies a 1-voter cluster can become leader without messaging and that a
# proposal commits in one stabilize round.

add-nodes id=1 voters=1
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0

status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateFollower term=0 lead=0 commit=0 lastIndex=0

campaign id=1
----
INFO 1 is starting a new election
INFO 1 became StateCandidate at term 1

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateCandidate term=1 commit=0
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=0
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1

status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateLeader term=1 lead=1 commit=1 lastIndex=1

propose id=1 data=hello
----
ok

stabilize
----
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=1
> 1 handling Ready: state=StateLeader term=1 commit=2

status id=1
----
id=1 state=StateLeader term=1 lead=1 commit=2 lastIndex=2
